description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ubuntu:xenial Docker image and a single build stage. In the global before_script, update apt, install build-essential, pkg-config, cmake, libusb-1.0-0-dev, git, libboost-dev, libboost-filesystem-dev, and libboost-program-options-dev, then clone the scraw repository, run cmake -DBUILD_DOCS=OFF -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/usr, make, and make install; repeat the same steps for the scrawpp repository with cmake -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/usr and make install. Add a build_job in the build stage that creates a build directory, runs cmake .. and make to compile the project. No caches, artifacts, services, or rules are defined.
